extracted_json.summary_topic_line: TIM172A MOT-I lecture agenda: readings, Functional Maps, Industry Analysis, and HW#2.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Lecture agenda for TIM172A (MOT-I) on 10/2/25: organize the readings (LNCS and The Disk Drive Industry, on Canvas), an introduction to Functional Maps tied to HW#2 Prob 1, the main topic of Industry Analysis covering the Personal Computer Industry (HW#2 Prob 2: INTEL handout on Canvas), and a note that HW#2 is posted and due Thursday next week. Closing reminder that TIM172A is an engineering course: do not submit essays as solutions, and structure work to maximize information content with readability and user-friendliness.
